generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LowerLevelChassisActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls steering and speed via motor voltage commands for ACC functionality"
]

instance UpperLevelChassisActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hosts NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano executing ACC control logic (desired speed computation) and sends actuation commands via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Provides raw point cloud data for object detection and tracking in vehicle proximity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Captures ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) and surrounding object tracks via depth sensing"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoVehicleStateData, ObjectTrackData
]

instance EgoVehicleImplicitSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Implicit data streams including ego vehicle speed, steering angle, and detected objects (object tracks) updated per perception cycle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoVehicleStateData, ObjectTrackData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction Data Streams
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCamera, EgoVehicleImplicitSensors
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCamera, EgoVehicleImplicitSensors
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance Vehicle3DCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD representation of the vehicle for real-time visualization"
]

instance Environment3DCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD representation of vehicle environment for visualization"
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622 compliant ACC logic implemented in Controlling Functional Entity to compute desired speed based on lead vehicle distance"
]

instance ObjectTrackStateModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "State models for detected objects (position, velocity) derived from LiDAR and depth camera data"
]

instance EgoVehicleStateModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "State models for ego vehicle (speed, steering angle) derived from sensor data"
]

instance HistoricalDataStorage : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing historical object tracks and vehicle state data for reporting and analysis"
]

instance RealTimeObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current object tracks with position, velocity state estimates for DT visualization and control"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData, EgoVehicleStateData, ObjectTrackData
]

instance EgoVehicleStateDataModel : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) for DT monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 for inter-component communication and software package management"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Compute-intensive task execution platform for ACC control logic"
]

instance NVIDIAJetpackSDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Provides real-time execution capabilities for ROS2 nodes on Jetson devices"
]

instance Python38Environment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Rapid prototyping environment for DT implementation"
]

instance CPlusPlusROS2Environment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ ROS2 node lifecycle implementation for ACC control components"
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Point cloud clustering and tracking implementation for perception components"
]

instance CustomDataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 compliant data translation for serialization, unit conversion, and message alignment"
]

instance Custom3DVisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D rendering of object tracks and vehicle state for monitoring"
]

// C12: Data Flow Connections
LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:fromData CustomDataTranslationFE
EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:fromData CustomDataTranslationFE
ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:fromData CustomDataTranslationFE

Vehicle3DCADModel : DTDFVocab:inputTo Custom3DVisualizationFE
Environment3DCADModel : DTDFVocab:inputTo Custom3DVisualizationFE
ObjectTrackStateModel : DTDFVocab:inputTo Custom3DVisualizationFE
EgoVehicleStateModel : DTDFVocab:inputTo Custom3DVisualizationFE

HistoricalDataStorage : DTDFVocab:inputTo CustomDataTranslationFE
RealTimeObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:inputTo Custom3DVisualizationFE
EgoVehicleStateDataModel : DTDFVocab:inputTo Custom3DVisualizationFE

// C13: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state, detected object tracks, and projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeObjectTrackData, EgoVehicleStateDataModel
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC control logic from vehicle ECUs to DT Entity for real-time processing"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlModel
    DTDFVocab:enables NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to control ACC remotely via control panel (enable/disable, set speed, trigger emergency braking)"
    DTDFVocab:provides ActionRemoteControl
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable reports of object tracks and vehicle state as time-series data"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataStorage
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ActionRemoteControl : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote control actions for ACC system including enable/disable, speed setting, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance InsightSituationalAwareness : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected paths for situational awareness"
]

instance InsightRemoteTroubleshooting : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data collection and reporting capabilities for developers to diagnose system issues during ACC development"
]

// C18: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LowerLevelChassisActuator, UpperLevelChassisActuator,
                 HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera, EgoVehicleImplicitSensors,
                 NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano, VedderSpeedController
]

instance DigitalTwinEntityEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ROS2Middleware, CustomDataTranslationFE,
                 Custom3DVisualizationFE, RealTimeMonitoringService,
                 ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService,
                 ReportGenerationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction includes:
  - **ACC control commands**: The DT computes desired speed based on lead vehicle distance and sends actuation commands (motor voltage) to the physical twin via the **Actuation FE** (ROS2 nodes). The **Vedder Electronic Speed Controller** executes these commands to adjust vehicle speed.
  - **Remote management commands**: Users can enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, or trigger emergency braking via the **Control Panel** (User Interface FE), which sends commands over Wi-Fi to the DT Entity for forwarding to the physical twin.
  - **Synchronization**: Clock synchronization between devices is required with **≤100 ms accuracy** to coordinate events and ensure data integrity in distributed systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates in real-time with strict timing constraints. Data collection and processing occur at a latency of ≤100 ms, as specified by 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication. Clock synchronization ensures a 100 ms accuracy for distributed systems, enabling reliable event ordering and coordination between the physical twin and digital twin components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is structured as a **three-entity system** (ISO 23247 RA):
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts sensors (LiDAR, camera), pre-processing (DBSCAN, Kalman filtering), and actuation (motor voltage commands).
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Manages data collection (object tracks, ego state), control logic (ACC), and reporting (SQL databases).
  - **User Entity**: Provides interfaces via **3D Visualization** (User Interface FE) and **Control Panel** (User Interface FE) for monitoring and remote management.
  - **Cross-System Entity**: Implements **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity communication (ROS2/Wi-Fi). The **Physical Twin Entity** is a custom addition to the standard, reflecting automotive-specific requirements."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates across two primary lifecycle stages: 1) **Design Phase**: Used as a cyber-physical experimentation platform for ACC system development, validation, and compliance testing with ISO 15622 standards. 2) **Operational Phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, remote management, and troubleshooting during vehicle operation. The system does not explicitly cover manufacturing or predictive maintenance phases for this specific ACC-DT case study, though related work in automotive DTs includes these broader applications."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification**: Real-time latency (<100 ms) and clock synchronization (<100 ms) are validated via hardware/software testing.
  - **Validation**: ACC control logic adheres to ISO 15622 (performance class I) and is tested on the 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle.
  - **Uncertainty**: Object tracks and ego state are derived from sensor fusion (LiDAR + depth camera) with DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering to mitigate noise.
  - **Data Integrity**: The Data Translation FE ensures consistent message formats and unit conversions between entities."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection employs:
  - **Communication Protocols**:
    - **ROS2** for intra-entity communication (e.g., between Physical Twin Entity and Digital Twin Entity).
    - **Wi-Fi** for inter-entity communication (e.g., between DT Entity and User Entity).
  - **Network Architecture**: Point-to-point connections with **≤100 ms end-to-end latency** (3GPP TS 22.185).
  - **Data Synchronization**: NTP or similar mechanisms ensure clock accuracy (<100 ms) across devices."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is deployed in a hybrid architecture: 1) **Onboard Components**: NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (Digital Twin Entity) and Jetson NX (Physical Twin Entity) handle real-time processing and sensor fusion. 2) **External Storage**: Ego vehicle state data (speed, steering, object tracks) is stored on external devices due to limited onboard storage. 3) **Cloud Offloading**: Computation-intensive tasks (e.g., ACC logic) are offloaded to cloud infrastructure for resource efficiency. The deployment does not specify exact hardware assignments for Digital Twin Entity or Physical Twin Entity beyond their roles in autonomy."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with:
  - **External Systems**: No explicit mention of integration with other DTs or external information systems (e.g., fleet coordination) in this case study."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture (RA) for digital twin development, adapted for automotive use.
  - **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) performance requirements (performance class I).
  - **3GPP TS 22.185**: Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication latency requirements (<100 ms).
  - **ROS2**: Robot Operating System 2 for middleware and software package management."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Remote Management**: Emergency braking commands can be triggered remotely, but no explicit cybersecurity measures (e.g., encryption, authentication) are described.
  - **Safety-Critical Requirements**: ACC control logic is validated against ISO 15622, and latency (<100 ms) ensures safe operation. The system is **Human-in-the-Loop** (Fully Autonomous Digital Twin) with explicit user interfaces for oversight.
  - **Hardware Safety**: The 1/10th-scale vehicle limits risks, but no mention of fail-safes (e.g., redundant sensors) for full-scale deployment."
]
